name: @lupinum/trellis
description: Opinionated app platform for repeated Nuxt + Convex + Better Auth + MCP apps
author: Matthias Amon <ma4m0>

scripts.build: pnpm run build:module && pnpm run build:client && pnpm run build:cli
scripts.build:module: nuxt-module-build build && node scripts/fix-dts-specifiers.mjs && node scripts/check-dist-dts-specifiers.mjs && node scripts/check-define-better-auth-esm.mjs
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run check:publish-surface && pnpm run test:types && pnpm run test:contracts && pnpm run check:cli && pnpm run check:examples:doctor
scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:prepare && nuxi dev --cwd apps/harness --dotenv .env.local
scripts.dev:local: INTERNAL_HARNESS_ENABLE_PRIVATE_BRIDGE_REFERENCE=true CONVEX_PRIVATE_BRIDGE_KEY=internal-harness-private-bridge-key-not-for-production USE_LOCAL_CONVEX=true pnpm run dev:prepare && INTERNAL_HARNESS_ENABLE_PRIVATE_BRIDGE_REFERENCE=true CONVEX_PRIVATE_BRIDGE_KEY=internal-harness-private-bridge-key-not-for-production USE_LOCAL_CONVEX=true nuxi dev --cwd apps/harness --dotenv .env.local
scripts.dev:local:reset: INTERNAL_HARNESS_ENABLE_PRIVATE_BRIDGE_REFERENCE=true CONVEX_PRIVATE_BRIDGE_KEY=internal-harness-private-bridge-key-not-for-production USE_LOCAL_CONVEX=true RESET_LOCAL_BACKEND=true pnpm run dev:prepare && INTERNAL_HARNESS_ENABLE_PRIVATE_BRIDGE_REFERENCE=true CONVEX_PRIVATE_BRIDGE_KEY=internal-harness-private-bridge-key-not-for-production USE_LOCAL_CONVEX=true RESET_LOCAL_BACKEND=true nuxi dev --cwd apps/harness --dotenv .env.local
scripts.dev:prepare: nuxt-module-build prepare && pnpm --dir apps/harness exec nuxi prepare
scripts.release:verify: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run check:publish-surface && pnpm run check:compatibility-matrix && pnpm run test:types && pnpm run test:contracts && pnpm run test && pnpm run test:e2e && pnpm run check:starter-fixtures:typecheck && pnpm run check:starter-fixtures:build && pnpm run check:convex-generated:drift && pnpm run check:packs:no-workspace-refs && pnpm run audit:prod && pnpm run build
scripts.release:publish: node -e "console.error('Direct publish scripts are disabled. Run release:verify and release:pack, inspect .pack, then follow MAINTAINING.md.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.lint: pnpm run dev:prepare && pnpm run check:repo-policies && pnpm run check:compatibility-matrix && pnpm run check:docs:api-surface && pnpm run check:docs:links && pnpm run lint:src && pnpm run lint:tests && pnpm run lint:examples
scripts.lint:src: pnpm run lint:src:core && pnpm run lint:src:runtime:auth-convex && pnpm run lint:src:runtime:functions-mcp && pnpm run lint:src:runtime:rest
scripts.lint:src:core: eslint src/analysis src/cli src/devtools src/eslint src/installers src/module.ts src/module-internals --ignore-pattern '**/_generated/**'
scripts.lint:src:runtime:rest: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=6144 eslint src/runtime/args src/runtime/backend src/runtime/composables src/runtime/devtools src/runtime/feature src/runtime/identity-forwarding src/runtime/observability src/runtime/schema src/runtime/server src/runtime/testing src/runtime/type-primitives src/runtime/types src/runtime/utils src/runtime/visibility src/runtime/workspace --ignore-pattern '**/_generated/**'
scripts.test:contracts:repo: vitest run --project=unit --project=nuxt --project=server tests/nuxt tests/server tests/unit/cli-doctor.test.ts tests/unit/module-auto-imports.test.ts tests/unit/api-surface-doc.test.ts
scripts.test:contracts: pnpm run test:contracts:repo && pnpm run test:examples
scripts.test:internals: vitest run --project=unit tests/unit/auth-engine-state.test.ts tests/unit/module-setup.test.ts tests/unit/query-state.test.ts tests/unit/pagination-state.test.ts tests/unit/pagination-page-state.test.ts tests/unit/pagination-runtime-state.test.ts tests/unit/upload-queue-state.test.ts tests/unit/shared-query-subscription.test.ts tests/unit/upload-queue-runtime.test.ts tests/unit/global-hooks.test.ts
scripts.test:examples: pnpm run dev:prepare && pnpm run test:examples:prepared
scripts.test:examples:prepared: pnpm run build:module && pnpm --dir examples/01-public-todo test && pnpm --dir examples/02-auth-todo test && pnpm --dir examples/03-team-workspace test && pnpm --dir examples/04-saas-platform test && pnpm --dir examples/05-visibility-access test && pnpm --dir examples/06-multi-workspace test && pnpm --dir examples/07-mcp-reference test && pnpm --dir examples/08-component-mini-cms test
scripts.test: pnpm run dev:prepare && pnpm run test:repo && pnpm run test:examples:prepared
scripts.test:full: pnpm run test && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.test:types:examples:canonical: pnpm run build:module && pnpm --dir examples/04-saas-platform typecheck:tests && pnpm --dir examples/05-visibility-access typecheck:tests && pnpm --dir examples/06-multi-workspace typecheck:tests
scripts.test:types:harness-server: pnpm run dev:prepare && pnpm run test:types:harness-server:prepared
scripts.test:types: pnpm run dev:prepare && vue-tsc -p tsconfig.nuxt.json --noEmit && pnpm run test:types:contracts && pnpm run test:types:bridge && pnpm run test:types:public && pnpm run test:types:harness-server:prepared && pnpm run test:types:examples:canonical
scripts.check:starter-fixtures:typecheck: pnpm run build:module && pnpm run build:cli && node scripts/check-starter-fixtures.mjs --typecheck
scripts.check:starter-fixtures:build: pnpm run build:module && pnpm run build:cli && node scripts/check-starter-fixtures.mjs --build
